title: Money comes through me, not just from me
subtitle: A present-tense affirmation for widening what counts as an income source.
excerpt: A short affirmation from Day 30 of the MONEY program. The single phrase captures the shift from seeing yourself as the only generator of income to seeing income as something that can move through many channels.
sourceNotes: Adapted from Day 30 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).

content.text: A short affirmation from Day 30 of the MONEY program. The distinction is small but useful: from being the source of every pound to being one of the routes money moves through.
Money comes through me, not just from me.

Say it three times in the morning, hand on chest if useful. Let the distinction land: there is a difference between generating income yourself and being a place where income can arrive from multiple directions.
Adapted from Day 30 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).
